name: _DoIP_UDPPreSend
title: _DoIP_UDPPreSend
syntax: long _DoIP_UDPPreSend( BYTE DoIPVersion[], BYTE inverseVersion[], WORD payloadType[], DWORD payloadLen[], BYTE payload[]);
description: The DoIP implementation is about to send an UDP DoIP packet with the given content. It is possible to change the values in header and data, and to change the total length of the UDP packet.
Note that packets sent by DoIP_UDPSend are NOT indicated here since it is possi-ble to provide any data using these calls anyway.

parameters.name: DoIPVersion
parameters.description: Protocol version value to send, defaults to configured value.

return: -1: Drop this UDP packet, i.e. it is NOT sent. This may cause errors in the protocol state machine.
